name: git
description: Stage all changes and commit in one step, or use --short/--show/--checkout/--diff/--log with oneline format; --show --grep supports -A/-B/-C context lines.

parameters.name: directory
parameters.description: Optional repo directory as last argument

examples.expected: Stages all changes and commits with the given message in one step

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses git config+add+commit into 1 step and --short/--show/--diff/--checkout replaces separate git status/show/log/diff calls.
